Hons. , Electronics and Communication Engineering, 2025 Email : F20212930@GOA.BITS-PILANI.AC.IN Mobile : 7045669957 CGPA :7.06 ACADEMIC DETAILS COURSE | INSTITUTE/COLLEGE BOARD/UNIVERSITY SCORE | YEAR CLASS Pace Junior Science Maharashtra State Board of Secondary and Higher Secondary Education 04.33  | 2021 XI College MSBSHSE  we CLASS X_ | Witty International School International General Certificate of Secondary Education IGCSE  90.71  | 2019 Subjects / Electives Computer Programming , Foundations of Data Structures  Algorithms , Object Oriented Programming C++ Language , C Programming , Data Structures , Algorithms , Object-Oriented Programming OOP , Technical Proficienc: y Operating Systems , Computer Networking , SQL, MySQL, DBMS, HTML, CSS, JavaScript PROJECTS AssessAl - Al Mock Interviewer - Web Development Jan 2024 - Feb 2024  Built a real-time full-stack mock interviewer website using Next.js and Gemini API with frontend optimized by Tailwind CSS and Shadcn UI. + Implemented secure authentication using Clerk and utilized PostgreSQL with DrizzleORM for efficient data storage and retrieval .  Integrated video and microphone functionalities to enable real-time Al-driven assessments , providing users with immediate feedback and the ability to revisit past interviews for ongoing improvement . Carhub - Advanced Car Search Platform - Web Development Nov 2023 - Jan 2024 + Developed a scalable website with Next.js 13, React, TypeScript , and Tailwind CSS, optimizing performance through server-side rendering . + Utilized RapidAPI and IMAGIN .studio APIs to fetch comprehensive car details, enhancing the project s data integration capabilities .  Implemented advanced search and custom filtering functionalities , improving user engagement . OOP -Based Railway Reservation System - Object Oriented Programming Feb 2024 - Apr 2024 + Implemented advanced OOP features : used 6+ classes , method overloading , varargs , nested classes , abstract classes , and interfaces . + Ensured robustness and efficiency while integrating inheritance , exception handling, file I/O, and multithreading , for booking and canceling tickets across 5 trains on 3 routes, handling 10+ fields e.g., fare, seats . COMPETITIONS Moveworks Hack -Al-thon Sep, 2023  Developed a chatbot during a hackathon using LLM models , LangChain , and OpenAl embeddings , demonstrating expertise in advanced Al technologies and efficient communication capabilities . + Implemented web scraping to extract data from Moveworks , creating an Al chatbot to answer site-related questions . extracted_info.name: ADITYA SURESH

education.description: B.E. Hons., Electronics and Communication Engineering
CLASS XII (Maharashtra State Board of Secondary and Higher Secondary Education MSBSHSE)
CLASS X (International General Certificate of Secondary Education IGCSE)

achievements.title: AssessAI - AI Mock Interviewer
achievements.description: Built a real-time full-stack mock interviewer website using Next.js and Gemini API with frontend optimized by Tailwind CSS and Shadcn UI. Implemented secure authentication using Clerk and utilized PostgreSQL with DrizzleORM for efficient data storage and retrieval. Integrated video and microphone functionalities to enable real-time AI-driven assessments, providing users with immediate feedback and the ability to revisit past interviews for ongoing improvement.

achievements.title: Carhub - Advanced Car Search Platform
achievements.description: Developed a scalable website with Next.js 13, React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS, optimizing performance through server-side rendering. Utilized RapidAPI and IMAGIN.studio APIs to fetch comprehensive car details, enhancing the project's data integration capabilities. Implemented advanced search and custom filtering functionalities, improving user engagement.

achievements.title: OOP-Based Railway Reservation System
achievements.description: Implemented advanced OOP features: used 6+ classes, method overloading, varargs, nested classes, abstract classes, and interfaces. Ensured robustness and efficiency while integrating inheritance, exception handling, file I/O, and multithreading, for booking and canceling tickets across 5 trains on 3 routes, handling 10+ fields e.g., fare, seats.

achievements.title: Moveworks Hack-AI-thon
achievements.description: Developed a chatbot during a hackathon using LLM models, LangChain, and OpenAI embeddings, demonstrating expertise in advanced AI technologies and efficient communication capabilities. Implemented web scraping to extract data from Moveworks, creating an AI chatbot to answer site-related questions.

achievements.title: Software Development Intern Achievements at E-Sutra Technologies Pvt. Ltd.
achievements.description: Enhanced E-Sutra website features using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, improving UI/UX for 5,000+ monthly users and boosting user engagement. Redesigned button UI and optimized homepage elements, resulting in a 30% increase in user interaction. Debugged existing errors, enhancing system reliability and reducing error rates.

achievements.title: Volunteer Teacher at Abhigyaan
achievements.description: Tutored underprivileged students from 3rd to 10th grade, assisting them in preparing for their school examinations.
